scope_summary: Pre-public-release polish + QA bundle (Option D). Combines: (A) Phase 8 carryover C-P8-1..6, (B) selected Phase 6/7 deferred carryover, (C) master plan §'Phase 10 — QA + Polish'. Non-trivial archeology finding pre-flight: master plan §'Phase 8 — Downloads Pipeline' + §'Phase 9 — CF Pages Deploy' + §'Phase 10.4 README' already shipped 4-28 / 4-28 / Phase 7.3.

preflight_archeology.discovery_method: git log --oneline web/scripts/build-bundles.sh web/RELEASE.md + gh release view v1.0 + git ls-remote --tags origin

preflight_archeology.implication: Phase 9-of-this-execution = master plan §'Phase 10 — QA + Polish' renumbered, plus Phase 8 close carryover C-P8-1..6, plus selective Phase 6/7 deferred polish.
